scripts.dev:with-link:
turbo dev && echo '

—————————' && echo '🚀  Web dev server ready: http://localhost:5173' && echo '—————————
'
scripts.type-check: pnpm -r run type-check || pnpm -r run typecheck
scripts.build:railway: pnpm run clean && RAILWAY_DISABLE_BUILD_CACHE=true pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-cache && pnpm --filter @keeper/database run migrate:deploy:railway && pnpm run build
scripts.build:railway-debug: pnpm run clean && echo 'Railway build with full debugging' && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-cache --loglevel=verbose && pnpm run build --verbose
scripts.railway:verify: echo 'Verifying Railway build artifacts...' && find packages/kam/dist -name '*.js' -type f && ls -la packages/kam/dist/auth/
scripts.smoke:web: pnpm -F keeper-web run type-check && pnpm -F keeper-web run build
scripts.smoke:api: pnpm -F keeper-api run type-check && pnpm -F keeper-api exec vitest run src/tests/smoke --reporter=dot --silent
scripts.smoke: pnpm run smoke:api && pnpm run smoke:web
scripts.diag:verify:all: pnpm diag:verify:board-data && pnpm diag:verify:dmb && pnpm diag:verify:ctx
